metric_results.label: Data reliability score
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect weighted data reliability components and repair the weakest measured gate.

calculation.formula: weighted(core_metric_coverage, official_reconciliation_rate, provenance_coverage, period_completeness, dataframe_schema_validity, accepted_fact_confidence, ocr_resolution_health)

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: Composite plan-01 score must be a measured weighted result, not a forced perfect score.

metric_results.label: Core metric coverage
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

metric_results.label: Statement completeness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: Every required statement for the evaluated scope must be present.

metric_results.label: Source provenance coverage
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: Every evaluated fact must be traceable to a concrete source.

metric_results.label: Accepted official reconciliation
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: Material facts need strong official-source reconciliation.

metric_results.label: Material OCR error count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Resolve OCR errors that affect material numbers used in the report.

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: OCR errors affecting material report numbers cannot enter final artifacts.

metric_results.label: OCR unresolved rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Reduce unresolved OCR corpus errors and keep material OCR errors out of final artifacts.

threshold_policy.rationale: Corpus-level OCR unresolved rate is an operational warning threshold, not a hard zero release gate.

metric_results.label: Duplicate canonical fact count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Deduplicate canonical facts by ticker, period, line item, and source priority.

threshold_policy.rationale: Canonical facts must have one governed winner per ticker-period-line-item-source-priority key.

metric_results.label: Valuation method data readiness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Complete valuation input facts, Pandera schema validation, deduplication, and official reconciliation before valuation.

calculation.formula: core_metric_coverage >= 95% and official_reconciliation_rate >= 95% and duplicate_fact_count = 0 and dataframe_schema_validity = true

threshold_policy.rationale: Data reliability should gate valuation input readiness without conflating it with valuation publishability or recommendation policy.

metric_results.remediation_hint: Repair the connector DataFrame rows reported by Pandera before normalization.

per_sample_results.source_title: Derived shares from local raw BCTC cache TNH 2022FY

threshold_policy.rationale: Connector and golden fact rows must satisfy the governed DataFrame contract.

metric_results.detail: PDF-level source counts cannot prove claim-level coverage.

metric_results.remediation_hint: Repair claim-level citation mapping, source IDs, source tiers, and numeric evidence reconciliation.

threshold_policy.rationale: Citation keys must resolve to concrete evidence.

metric_results.label: Official source coverage

metric_results.label: Generic citation labels
metric_results.remediation_hint: Replace generic source labels with specific source IDs and evidence spans.

threshold_policy.rationale: Generic citation labels are not audit-ready.

metric_results.label: PDF source labels
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect the owning evaluator and add a domain-specific remediation hint.

metric_results.label: Tool permission compliance
metric_results.remediation_hint: Reject or repair tool calls that lack explicit permission metadata.

threshold_policy.rationale: Tool calls must comply with governed permissions.

metric_results.label: Artifact manifest compliance
metric_results.remediation_hint: Attach storage paths for facts, index, ratios, valuation, report, and evidence packet artifacts.

threshold_policy.rationale: Agent-produced artifacts must have governed storage lineage before export.

metric_results.label: Output schema validity
metric_results.remediation_hint: Validate required agent outputs against JSON schemas before downstream use.

threshold_policy.rationale: Required agent outputs must satisfy their JSON schemas.

metric_results.label: Role adherence
metric_results.remediation_hint: Review agent traces, tool permissions, schema validation, and calibrated judge results.

threshold_policy.rationale: Provisional diagnostic threshold from BENCHMARK_STANDARDS.md.

metric_results.label: Groundedness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Review agent traces, tool permissions, schema validation, and calibrated judge results.

threshold_policy.rationale: Provisional diagnostic threshold from BENCHMARK_STANDARDS.md.

metric_results.label: No unauthorized financial calculation
metric_results.remediation_hint: Move financial calculations from LLM narrative into deterministic code paths.

threshold_policy.rationale: Financial calculations belong in deterministic code paths, not free-form LLM reasoning.

metric_results.label: Task completion
metric_results.remediation_hint: Review incomplete agent trace events and retry policy.

threshold_policy.rationale: Required tasks must be materially completed.

metric_results.label: Plan adherence
metric_results.remediation_hint: Review agent traces, tool permissions, schema validation, and calibrated judge results.

threshold_policy.rationale: Provisional diagnostic threshold from BENCHMARK_STANDARDS.md.

metric_results.remediation_hint: Expand seeded issue fixtures and compare critic recall against expected labels.

threshold_policy.rationale: MVP diagnostic threshold for critic regression.

metric_results.label: Full run duration
metric_results.remediation_hint: Compare p95 runtime against warm/cold baseline and inspect slow stages.

metric_results.label: LLM retry rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

threshold_policy.rationale: Retry rate should remain low enough to control reliability and cost-to-serve.

metric_results.label: Retrieval fallback rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

threshold_policy.rationale: High fallback rate indicates degraded retrieval path quality.

metric_results.label: OCR failure rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

threshold_policy.rationale: Material OCR failures should remain rare and visible.

metric_results.label: Artifact upload failures
metric_results.remediation_hint: Retry or repair final artifact storage uploads before export.

threshold_policy.rationale: Final artifacts must be stored successfully.

metric_results.label: PDF render failures
metric_results.remediation_hint: Fix final PDF rendering failures before export.

threshold_policy.rationale: Final PDF render failure blocks export.
